Bash(cd "D:/Documentos/Desktop/klay+" && gh pr create --base main --head feat/infrastructure-profile --title "feat: 3-layer processing profile pipeline + infrastructure config" --body "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

- **Processing Profile Layers**: Redesigned `ProcessingProfile` from flat `chunkingStrategyId`/`embeddingStrategyId` to a 3-layer pipeline model: **Preparation** → **Fragmentation** → **Projection**. Each layer is a typed Value Object with configurable parameters \(chunk size, overlap, dimensions, batch size, etc.\)
- **PreparationStrategy port**: Added async `PreparationStrategy` port with NoOp \(pass-through\) and Basic \(whitespace normalization, encoding cleanup, trim\) implementations
- **Legacy migration**: On-read DTO migration detects old flat format and converts to 3-layer structure — no database migration needed
- **Full-stack**: Domain VOs, aggregate refactor, materializer, pipeline execution, service layer, orchestrator, REST API, composition factory, UI constants, and all profile forms updated

## Changes

### Core \(`@klay/core`\)
- 3 new Value Objects: `PreparationLayer`, `FragmentationLayer`, `ProjectionLayer`
- Refactored `ProcessingProfile` aggregate to use layer VOs
- `ProfileDTO` with shared NeDB/IndexedDB format + legacy `fromDTO\(\)` migration
- `PreparationStrategy` port + `NoOpPreparationStrategy` + `BasicPreparationStrategy`
- Normalized chunker `strategyId` props \(`recursive-chunker` → `recursive`, etc.\)
- Updated `ProcessingProfileMaterializer` for 3-layer resolution
- Added preparation step to `GenerateProjection` pipeline
- Updated `SemanticProcessingService`, orchestrator, REST adapter, DTOs
- 42 new tests \(28 VO + 4 DTO + 10 preparation strategy\)

### Web \(`@klay/web`\)
- Layer-based strategy constants \(`PREPARATION_STRATEGIES`, `FRAGMENTATION_STRATEGIES`\)
- Updated `CreateProfileForm`, `ProfileEditForm`, `ProfileList`, `ContextProjectionsPage`

## Test Plan
- [x] 374 core tests passing \(30 test files, 0 failures\)
- [x] Web build succeeds \(Server built in 8.73s\)
- [x] Legacy DTO migration verified \(on-read conversion\)
- [x] E2E pipeline test passes with 3-layer profiles

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)" 2>&1)
